title: Saved production sufficient to interrupt prescription
doc_html:
§88.  Saved production sufficient to interrupt prescription

To interrupt prescription it is not necessary that minerals be produced in paying quantities but only that they actually be produced and saved.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §88, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
